description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slender build, standing with arms extended horizontally. She has long hair styled in a side ponytail, and her facial features are softly defined. She is dressed in a sleeveless, low-cut top and high-waisted shorts, both fitted to her form, and wears gloves on both hands. Her footwear consists of simple, closed-toe shoes with a slight heel. The overall appearance suggests a casual, urban style suitable for a warm-weather environment.
description: A stylized adult woman in casual summer attire, with a side ponytail, gloves, and heeled shoes, standing with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and the full design of the top and shorts, as well as the gloves and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side ponytail, and the contour of the body and clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the ponytail, the back of the top and shorts, and the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile from the opposite side, with similar features as the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and high-waisted shorts with gloves
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled in a side ponytail
